meta.title: SvartulfrVerse Modern Characters
meta.author: Lys_5
meta.description: This modern drama setting centers on the tension between autonomy and extreme overprotection within the wealthy Douglas-Bloodmoon family. Detailed profiles cover Alyssa Douglas-Bloodmoon's life as a UCLA pre-med student, her secret career as an art model, and her complex ties to her twin Jasper, her father Erik, and her security detail including Malachia and Marcus Thornfield. Roleplays can explore themes of surveillance, family suffocatingness, and the struggle for independence amidst high-stakes security.
